title: CNBC Daily Open: Trump says Iran can 'be taken out in one night'
summary_full: Sharpening rhetoric erodes confidence of a breakthrough between Iran and the White House ahead of an 8 p.m. ET deadline.
summary_public: Sharpening rhetoric erodes confidence of a breakthrough between Iran and the White House ahead of an 8 p.m. ET deadline.
